description_long: This is a two-seater couch upholstered in dark brown, worn leather or faux leather, showing significant signs of age and use. The seat and back cushions are visibly sagging and creased, with some areas displaying deep wrinkles, scuffs, and discoloration, especially on the left seat and armrest. The armrests are broad and rectangular, matching the overall boxy silhouette of the couch. The backrest is divided into two large, slightly uneven cushions, each with visible wear and some flattening. The sides and back of the couch are also covered in the same material, with the right side showing pronounced stains or discoloration. No legs are visible, suggesting a low-profile or hidden base, and there are no accent pillows or decorative elements present.
description: A heavily worn, dark brown two-seater couch with sagging cushions, broad rectangular armrests, and visible stains and creases throughout.
description_view_0: Front view shows two sagging seat cushions, two worn back cushions, and broad rectangular armrests with visible creases and discoloration.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the flat, boxy armrest and the depth of the seat and back cushions, with less visible wear compared to the right side.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a plain, continuous back panel with minor creasing and no visible legs or decorative features.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals significant staining and discoloration on the armrest and side panel, with the same boxy armrest and cushion depth as the left.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large seat cushions and two large back cushions, all attached and integrated into the frame, with no accent or throw pillows visible.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark brown upholstery with a distressed, worn texture; no visible decorative stitching, tufting, or patterned motifs.
attribute_leg_style: Legs are not visible, suggesting a hidden or recessed base, giving the couch a grounded, low-profile appearance.
attribute_armrest_design: Armrests are straight, broad, and rectangular, matching the height of the backrest and covered in the same worn material.
attribute_backrest_type: Backrest consists of two large, attached, slightly uneven cushions, forming a divided but continuous back with visible sagging and wear.
